psychotherapy.title: Trauma-focused psychotherapy review
psychotherapy.message: Psychotherapy should remain a clinician-reviewed option and depends on readiness, safety, and stabilization.

medication.title: Medication evidence review
medication.message: Medication outputs are evidence review only and require contraindication and interaction review.

neuromodulation.title: Neuromodulation evidence review
neuromodulation.message: Neuromodulation remains specialist-reviewed and should never be emitted as an order or protocol.

supplements.title: Supplements and nutrition evidence review
supplements.message: Supplement outputs are low-confidence evidence review only and require interaction/safety review.
